---
title: "Blanche C. Webber"
---

## Blanche C. Webber

**Dates:** (b. 1859/60)

### Description

  daughter of Catharine Elgie

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from [25 February 1881]
- Letter from Feb 26th 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
